name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Austin's Cash America Pawn at 7544 N Lamar Blvd on North Lamar provides quick cash loans on jewelry, electronics, and valuables with convenient daily hours.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn is located at 7544 N Lamar Blvd in Austin, TX, in the North Lamar area of the city. This standalone location serves the Austin community with a full range of pawn services. The shop operates six days a week from 9 AM to 7 PM Monday through Saturday, and opens at noon on Sundays, closing at 5 PM, making it accessible for both weekday and weekend visits from anywhere in Austin.

At this Austin location, you can pawn items including jewelry, electronics, sporting goods, and musical instruments. The team buys items outright or issues loans against personal property, and they accept over-the-counter purchases as well. For specific questions about your items or current loan offers, call the store directly at 512-467-2568.

If you're in Austin looking for immediate cash or need a loan against an item you own, this North Lamar location is convenient and fast. Bring a valid photo ID to complete any transaction. Cash America Pawn has served communities across the region, and this Austin shop provides the same straightforward pawn services the brand is known for.
pros: Massive network of 3,300+ locations across 29 states plus international presence, ensuring accessibility
No credit checks required—serves cash and credit-constrained consumers who cannot qualify for traditional loans
Immediate cash disbursement on the spot for items of value
Non-recourse loans mean no personal liability beyond losing the pledged item
Diverse merchandise buying—accepts jewelry, electronics, tools, gold, and many other valuables
Convenient layaway service with only 10% down payment required for purchases
Public company status (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) provides corporate stability and transparency
cons: Risk of permanent loss of personal property if loan is not repaid on time
Pawn loans are a short-term solution and not suitable for long-term financial needs
Loan terms and interest rates not disclosed on website, requiring in-store consultation
Dependent on having valuable collateral to qualify for a loan
Emotional difficulty for customers who lose sentimental or essential items
best_for: Cash-constrained consumers who need fast funds and lack access to credit
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) willing to use them as collateral
Individuals seeking short-term loans without credit checks or income verification requirements
Customers interested in buying discounted merchandise or pawned goods
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers with valuable collateral who need immediate funds without credit qualification. The main caveat is that pawn loans involve risking loss of personal property and should only be used as a short-term emergency solution when other borrowing options are unavailable.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Gold and precious metal buying services
Lease-to-own payment solutions through AFF subsidiary
Retail finance payment solutions through 15,000+ merchant partners
In-store merchandise inventory search and shopping
Cash payment on the spot for items of value
meta_description: Cash America Pawn at 7544 N Lamar Blvd, Austin, TX. Quick cash loans on jewelry, electronics, and valuables with daily hours including weekends.
